title: Huge rise in harmful social media posts this World Cup
summary: FIFA has documented a 14-fold increase in harmful social media posts and comments during this World Cup compared to 2022. This surge in online toxicity during the tournament reflects broader concerns about the damaging impact of social media on major sporting events.
content: There have been 14 times more harmful social media posts and comments during this World Cup than in 2022, Fifa finds.

zh.title: 本届世界杯有害社交媒体帖子大幅增加
zh.summary: 国际足联记录了本届世界杯期间有害社交媒体帖子和评论数量相比2022年增加了14倍。赛事期间在线毒性的激增反映了人们对社交媒体对重大体育赛事造成伤害的更广泛关注。

title: The classroom moment that bonds finalists De la Fuente & Scaloni forever
summary: Spain manager Luis de la Fuente and Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni, who will face each other in Sunday's World Cup final, share a long-standing personal connection from their past. Their relationship demonstrates how football's international networks connect top managers across competing nations.
content: Spain manager Luis de la Fuente and Argentina boss Lionel Scaloni will go head-to-head in the World Cup final on Sunday - and the two men know each other well.

zh.title: 课堂时刻永远联系了决赛选手德拉富恩特和斯卡洛尼
zh.summary: 西班牙主教练路易斯·德拉富恩特和阿根廷主教练莱昂内尔·斯卡洛尼将在周日的世界杯决赛中相遇，他们在过去有着长期的个人联系。他们的关系展示了足球的国际网络如何连接不同竞争国家的顶级教练。

title: Quiz: Name every men's World Cup final host city
summary: This quiz challenges readers to name every city that has hosted a men's World Cup final throughout tournament history. The interactive exercise reflects the evolution of the World Cup's global reach and prestige over its seven decades.
content: The World Cup final is where heroes are made and dreams come true for players and fans alike. Can you name every city that has ever hosted the showpiece?

zh.title: 测验：说出每个男足世界杯决赛主办城市的名称
zh.summary: 这个测验挑战读者说出整个赛事历史上举办过男足世界杯决赛的每个城市的名称。这个互动练习反映了世界杯在过去七十年间全球影响力和声誉的演变。

title: A bit 'blah' or a worthy host? Is MetLife  right World Cup final choice?
summary: North America correspondent examines the decision to hold the World Cup final at MetLife Stadium, weighing it against competing venue options. The choice reflects ongoing debate about what constitutes an appropriate setting for football's most prestigious match.
content: North America correspondent Nada Tawfik explores the decision to award the World Cup final to MetLife Stadium amid competition from rival venues.

zh.title: 有点平凡还是实至名归?MetLife球场是否适合举办世界杯决赛?
zh.summary: 北美特派员审视了在MetLife球场举办世界杯决赛的决定,权衡了其他竞争场馆的选项。这一选择反映了关于什么样的场地最适合足球最重要赛事的持续辩论。

title: Gemmill leaves Scotland U21 role after 13 years
summary: Scot Gemmill is stepping down as Scotland's Under-21 head coach after 13 years with the Scottish FA. His departure marks the end of a significant tenure in developing Scotland's young football talent pipeline.
content: Scot Gemmill will depart from the role of Scotland Under-21 head coach after 13 years, the Scottish FA has announced.

zh.title: Gemmill离开苏格兰U21主教练岗位,任职13年
zh.summary: 斯科特·Gemmill在苏格兰足协服职13年后,正式卸任苏格兰U21青年队主教练。他的离职标志着一个重要时代的结束,也见证了他在培养苏格兰青少年足球人才方面做出的重大贡献。

title: World Cup winner Capdevila appeals to Trump after US travel permit denied
summary: Former Spain international Joan Capdevila has appealed to President Donald Trump after being denied a US travel permit ahead of the World Cup final. The incident highlights the intersection of politics and international sports access.
content: Former Spain international Joan Capdevila has made a plea to US President Donald Trump for help after he says he was denied a travel permit to enter the United States before  Sunday's World Cup final.

zh.title: 世界杯冠军Capdevila在美国旅行证被拒后向特朗普申诉
zh.summary: 前西班牙国脚胡安·Capdevila在被拒发美国旅行证后,向特朗普总统提出申诉。这一事件突显了政治与国际体育参赛权利的交集。

title: Life after Kane - are England facing a false nine future?
summary: With England's record scorer Harry Kane approaching the end of his international career, analysts are considering whether England will adopt a false nine formation in future competitions. The potential tactical shift reflects the need for strategic adaptation as key players retire.
content: Are England facing the prospect of using a false nine up front once record scorer Harry Kane calls time on his international career?

zh.title: 凯恩之后 - 英格兰是否面临中锋缺位的未来?
zh.summary: 随着英格兰进球纪录保持者哈里·凯恩接近职业生涯末尾，分析人士正在考虑英格兰是否会在未来比赛中采用中锋缺位的阵容。这种潜在的战术转变反映了随着关键球员退役，球队需要进行战略性调整。

title: The harrowing dark side of England's World Cup exit
summary: Research reveals that domestic abuse incidents increase during England's World Cup matches, with women and girls experiencing heightened safety concerns during tournaments. The findings highlight serious social consequences of major sporting events beyond the pitch.
content: During a major football tournament such as the World Cup, some women and girls are constantly living in fear - because domestic abuse rises when England play, research shows.

zh.title: 英格兰世界杯出局的可怕黑暗面
zh.summary: 研究表明，在英格兰世界杯比赛期间，家庭暴力事件增加，女性和女孩在赛事期间面临更高的安全隐患。这些发现突出了重大体育赛事在竞技场外所带来的严重社会后果。

title: How Villa's record signing Manzambi can spearhead new era
summary: Aston Villa's record signing Johan Manzambi, who joined for over £50 million, is positioned to be a central figure in the club's new chapter. The investment signals the club's ambitions as it enters what management views as a transformative era.
content: It is a new era for Aston Villa - and Johan Manzambi, who has just joined in a club record deal worth more than £50m - will be one of the poster boys.

zh.title: 阿斯顿维拉创纪录签约曼扎姆比如何引领新时代
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉以超过5000万英镑签约创纪录转会约翰·曼扎姆比，他被定位为俱乐部新篇章的核心人物。这笔投资表明了俱乐部的雄心，因为它正在进入管理层认为是变革性的时代。

title: More games and more controversy - has World Cup been a success?
summary: The 2026 World Cup has been marked by expanded formats, high ticket prices, hydration breaks, and various political interventions, generating debate about its overall success. The tournament illustrates how modern World Cups navigate commercial, regulatory, and geopolitical pressures.
content: From high ticket prices to hydration breaks, new laws and political interventions, there has rarely been a dull moment at the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 更多比赛，更多争议 - 世界杯成功了吗？
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯以扩大的比赛格式、高票价、补水休息和各种政治干预为特点，引发了关于其总体成功的辩论。该赛事说明了现代世界杯如何应对商业、监管和地缘政治压力。

title: Messi and Brady in disbelief over 'prophetic' Lamine Yamal photo
summary: Lionel Messi expressed amazement at facing Spain's Lamine Yamal in the World Cup final, recalling that he was photographed with Yamal as a baby years ago. The moment captures the passage of time and generational transition in world football.
content: Argentina's Lionel Messi says it is "crazy" to be facing Spain's Lamine Yamal in a World Cup final after being photographed with him as a baby.

zh.title: 梅西和布雷迪对"预言性"的亚马尔照片感到难以置信
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西对在世界杯决赛中面对西班牙的亚马尔感到惊讶，回忆起多年前他曾与亚马尔在婴儿时期合照。这一刻捕捉了足球世界中时间的流逝和代际更新。

title: Hassan priority target for Celtic - gossip
summary: Winger Hassan is emerging as Celtic's primary transfer target in the current market. The Scottish club is actively pursuing his signature as part of broader transfer activity involving Aberdeen and Motherwell departures.
content: Winger becomes key Celtic target, Aberdeen comings and goings and Motherwell agree deal to sell winger.

zh.title: 凯尔特人优先追求哈桑 - 转会八卦
zh.summary: 边锋哈桑正成为凯尔特人在当前市场上的首要转会目标。这支苏格兰俱乐部正在积极争取他的签约，这是涉及阿伯丁和莫瑟韦尔离队的更广泛转会活动的一部分。

title: Best finishers, defensive kings & runners - World Cup finalists in numbers
summary: Spain and Argentina will face each other in the World Cup final, with Spanish side holding the European championship title and Argentina defending their World Cup crown and South American championship. BBC Sport analyzes the statistical comparison across key performance metrics between the two sides.
content: European champions Spain will face World Cup holders and South American champions Argentina in the final. How do they compare? BBC Sport takes a look at the numbers.

zh.title: 最佳射手、防线之王与亚军 - 世界杯决赛队伍数据分析
zh.summary: 西班牙和阿根廷将在世界杯决赛中相遇，西班牙队拥有欧洲冠军头衔，阿根廷正卫冕世界杯冠军和南美冠军。BBC体育分析了两支球队在主要性能指标方面的统计对比。

title: Rooney, Hart and Richards row down Hudson River
summary: Former England internationals Wayne Rooney, Joe Hart, and Micah Richards participated in a rowing activity together on the Hudson River as part of their media duties. The three BBC pundits took on the physical challenge during their coverage.
content: Wayne Rooney rows down the Hudson River with fellow BBC pundits Joe Hart and Micah Richards.

zh.title: 鲁尼、哈特和理查兹在哈德逊河上划船
zh.summary: 英格兰前国脚韦恩·鲁尼、乔·哈特和米卡·理查兹一起在哈德逊河上进行了划船活动，这是他们媒体工作的一部分。这三位BBC评论员在节目期间接受了这项身体挑战。

title: 'Similar to Courtois' - could Penders become Chelsea number one?
summary: Chelsea's young goalkeeper prospect Mike Penders is being favorably compared to Thibaut Courtois due to their shared development pathway. The comparison suggests Penders could potentially become a world-class number one for the club.
content: Chelsea's newest goalkeeping prospect, Mike Penders, is from the same production line that produced the legendary Thibaut Courtois.

zh.title: '类似于库尔图瓦' - 彭德斯能成为切尔西门神吗？
zh.summary: 切尔西年轻门神前景球员迈克·彭德斯因其与蒂博·库尔图瓦相似的发展道路而受到良好比较。这一比较表明彭德斯有可能成为俱乐部的世界级门神。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 41
summary: BBC Sport invites readers to identify an anonymous World Cup player through an interactive guessing game format. Participants must correctly name the mystery player in as few attempts as possible.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜世界杯明星第41号
zh.summary: BBC体育邀请读者通过互动猜谜游戏格式识别一位匿名的世界杯球员。参与者必须在尽可能少的尝试中正确说出谜题球员的名字。

title: Defiant Tuchel defends decisions and says loss is 'scar we carry now'
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel defended his tactical decisions following the team's World Cup semi-final defeat to Argentina at a tense news conference. Tuchel characterized the loss as a deep wound that will serve as motivation going forward.
content: England head coach Thomas Tuchel defends his tactical decisions during the World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina in a tense news conference.

zh.title: 坚定的图赫尔为自己的决定辩护，称失利是"我们现在要承载的伤疤"
zh.summary: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图赫尔在紧张的新闻发布会上为球队在世界杯半决赛对阿根廷失利后的战术决定进行了辩护。图赫尔将这场失利描述为一道深深的伤口，将成为今后前进的动力。

title: 'They made him a defensive player' - Trump questions Kane role in loss
summary: Donald Trump criticizes England's World Cup semi-final tactics, questioning why Harry Kane was deployed in a defensive role during their loss to Argentina. His comments add to broader debate about England's tactical approach in the match.
content: US President Donald Trump joins criticism of England's tactics in their World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina, by questioning Harry Kane's second-half "defensive" role.

zh.title: "他们把他变成了防守型球员" - 特朗普质疑凯恩在失利中的角色
zh.summary: 特朗普批评英格兰在世界杯半决赛中的战术，质疑为什么哈里·凯恩在对阿根廷的失利中被部署在防守位置。他的评论加剧了关于英格兰比赛战术方针的广泛辩论。

title: Argentina like to leave mark on opponents - Laporte
summary: Spanish defender Aymeric Laporte warns that Argentina, ahead of the World Cup final, is known for physical, aggressive play. His comments highlight concerns about Argentina's playing style and approach against opponents.
content: Spain defender Aymeric Laporte claims World Cup final opponents Argentina are a team that "likes to leave a mark on their opponents".

zh.title: 阿根廷喜欢对对手留下印记 - 拉波尔特
zh.summary: 西班牙后卫艾梅里克·拉波尔特警告说，在世界杯决赛前，阿根廷以身体对抗和侵略性踢法而闻名。他的言论突出了对阿根廷比赛风格和对阵对手方式的担忧。
